links.title: Subglacial lakes boundaries and elevation time series
Subglacial lakes boundaries and elevation time series

data.title: Subglacial lakes boundaries and elevation time series data

parquet:columns.name: lake_period_id
parquet:columns.description: Unique identifier for a subglacial lake activity event and boundary delineation period. Constructed from lake name, boundary delineation period, and elevation contour threshold, for example 'Academy_45_201312-201608_0.4'.

parquet:columns.name: lake_name
parquet:columns.description: Name of the Antarctic subglacial lake or lake feature associated with the observation.

parquet:columns.name: new_sgl_glake
parquet:columns.description: Classification or inventory status of the lake, indicating whether the feature is a newly identified active subglacial lake, a previously known subglacial lake, or a related glacial lake inventory category where available.

parquet:columns.name: period_start_date
parquet:columns.description: Start date of the elevation-change period used to delineate the subglacial lake activity boundary.

parquet:columns.name: period_end_date
parquet:columns.description: End date of the elevation-change period used to delineate the subglacial lake activity boundary.

parquet:columns.name: contour_m_yr
parquet:columns.long_name: Elevation-change contour used for boundary delineation
parquet:columns.description: Elevation-change rate contour threshold used to delineate the subglacial lake activity boundary for the specified lake period.

parquet:columns.name: geometry
parquet:columns.description: Geometry representing the spatial boundary of the subglacial lake activity area for the specified lake period. Stored as the GeoParquet geometry column.

parquet:columns.name: in_lake_mean_anom_m
parquet:columns.description: Mean ice-surface elevation anomaly measured within the delineated subglacial lake boundary for the monthly observation.

parquet:columns.name: in_lake_n
parquet:columns.description: Number of elevation observations or grid cells contributing to the in-lake monthly summary.

parquet:columns.name: in_lake_std_m
parquet:columns.long_name: Standard deviation of in-lake elevation anomaly
parquet:columns.description: Standard deviation of ice-surface elevation anomaly values within the delineated lake boundary for the monthly observation.

parquet:columns.name: in_lake_err_m
parquet:columns.description: Estimated uncertainty for the in-lake mean elevation anomaly for the monthly observation.

parquet:columns.name: in_lake_cum_err_m
parquet:columns.long_name: Cumulative uncertainty of in-lake elevation anomaly
parquet:columns.description: Cumulative uncertainty associated with the in-lake elevation anomaly time series up to the monthly observation.

parquet:columns.name: in_lake_detrended_mean_anom_m
parquet:columns.description: Mean ice-surface elevation anomaly within the lake boundary after removal of the background elevation trend. This is the primary in-lake anomaly variable for identifying filling and drainage behaviour.

parquet:columns.name: out_lake_mean_anom_m
parquet:columns.description: Mean ice-surface elevation anomaly measured outside the delineated subglacial lake boundary, used as a local background or reference signal for the monthly observation.

parquet:columns.name: out_lake_n
parquet:columns.description: Number of elevation observations or grid cells contributing to the out-of-lake monthly summary.

parquet:columns.name: out_lake_std_m
parquet:columns.long_name: Standard deviation of out-of-lake elevation anomaly
parquet:columns.description: Standard deviation of ice-surface elevation anomaly values outside the lake boundary for the monthly observation.

parquet:columns.name: out_lake_err_m
parquet:columns.description: Estimated uncertainty for the out-of-lake mean elevation anomaly for the monthly observation.

parquet:columns.name: out_lake_cum_err_m
parquet:columns.long_name: Cumulative uncertainty of out-of-lake elevation anomaly
parquet:columns.description: Cumulative uncertainty associated with the out-of-lake elevation anomaly time series up to the monthly observation.

parquet:columns.name: out_lake_detrended_mean_anom_m
parquet:columns.description: Mean ice-surface elevation anomaly outside the lake boundary after removal of the background elevation trend. Used as a reference signal for comparison with in-lake elevation change.

parquet:columns.name: elevation_date
parquet:columns.description: Timestamp of the monthly CryoSat-2-derived elevation observation represented by the row.

parquet:columns.name: name
parquet:columns.description: Lake name as used in the source data and in construction of the lake_period_id. This may duplicate or preserve a less-normalised version of lake_name.

data.proj:wkt2: GEOGCRS["WGS 84",ENSEMBLE["World Geodetic System 1984 ensemble",MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (Transit)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G730)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G873)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G1150)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G1674)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G1762)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G2139)"],MEMBER["World Geodetic System 1984 (G2296)"],ELLIPSOID["WGS 84",6378137,298.257223563,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],ENSEMBLEACCURACY[2.0]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],CS[ellipsoidal,2],AXIS["geodetic latitude (Lat)",north,ORDER[1],ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],AXIS["geodetic longitude (Lon)",east,ORDER[2],ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],USAGE[SCOPE["Horizontal component of 3D system."],AREA["World."],BBOX[-90,-180,90,180]],ID["EPSG",4326]]
